$schema_note: Phase 5.5 M3 draft-compare golden set. Each case posts (previous, current, options) to /v1/analyze-draft-compare and asserts that insight types in the response intersect expected_insight_types_any_of and exclude expected_insight_types_must_not_include. expected_summary lets a case pin specific delta counts.

cases.name: motif_swap_fire_to_rain

previous.content:
[verse]
The fire on the hill is burning
The fire in my chest still calls

[chorus]
Hold me in the midnight window
Hold me when the city glows

current.content:
[verse]
The rain across the road is falling
The rain on every window calls

[chorus]
Hold me in the midnight window
Hold me when the city glows

cases.notes: Swapping fire imagery for rain imagery should produce motif deltas.

cases.name: identical_drafts_no_deltas

previous.content:
[verse]
I hear your shadow in the hall
I hear your footsteps on the floor

current.content:
[verse]
I hear your shadow in the hall
I hear your footsteps on the floor

cases.notes: Identical drafts must produce zero deltas across every family.

cases.name: repetition_signal_added_in_chorus

previous.content:
[chorus]
We sing tonight
We dance below the moon

current.content:
[chorus]
We sing tonight
We dance tonight

cases.notes: Adding a shared ending word ('tonight') should produce an ending-repeat signal added.

cases.name: structure_mismatch_unmatched_bridge

previous.content:
[verse]
I walk the road tonight
I carry every light

[chorus]
Hold me near
Hold me clear

current.content:
[verse]
I walk the road tonight
I carry every light

[bridge]
A new step on the road
A new line in the song

[chorus]
Hold me near
Hold me clear

cases.notes: Inserting a bridge should land in unmatched_current_section_ids rather than produce shift insights across the verse/chorus pair. (No insight-type assertion; this case mainly guards against false positives.)

cases.name: consistency_drift_resolved

previous.content:
[verse]
I walk alone tonight
I hold my dreams in sight
I never let them go
I keep them safe and slow

[chorus]
You take your time and shine
You give your heart for mine
You call across the night
You make the morning right

current.content:
[verse]
I walk alone tonight
I hold my dreams in sight
I never let them go
I keep them safe and slow

[chorus]
I take my time and shine
I give my heart for mine
I call across the night
I make the morning right

cases.notes: Previous draft has a clear I→You perspective flip; current keeps a single perspective.
